title: Live-in Caregiver Program: Change employer or work permit, apply for permanent residency - Canada.ca
content:
## Live-in Caregiver Program
Find out how to change your employer under the Live-in Caregiver Program (LCP), apply to change your employer, extend or change the conditions of your work permit and learn about applying for permanent residency.
The Live-in Caregiver Program (LCP) is closed to new applicants.
- Check processing times
- Link your paper application to your online account

## Services and information

### Find out if you can change your employer
What you need to change employers under the LCP and what to do if you don’t already have a new employer

### Apply to change your employer
Sign an employment contract, get a Labour Market Impact Assessment and apply for a new work permit

### Extend or change your LCP work permit
Extend or change the details of your work permit, apply for an open work permit, and know what happens if you quit or lose your job

### Apply to stay in Canada permanently
Find out if you are eligible, what affects your application and how to apply for your family

### Know your rights as a foreign worker
Learn about employment or labour standards where you will be working
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Job Bank is the Government of Canada's leading source for jobs and labour market information.
Find quick and direct answers to your questions, including how to complete application forms, extend visas and permits and replace lost documents.

### Find free newcomer services near you
Find friendly and experienced settlement professionals who can help you feel at home in Canada.
